plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-562 RP18.P04.M03.S19-RP18.P04.M05.S14 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-562 implements descriptor-only coverage of the RP18.P04 workflow permission slice: the M03 Primary Implementation Slice tail (the four remaining rows), the full M04 Secondary Workflow Slice cycle (twenty-two rows), and the M05 Permission And Audit Binding head (the first fourteen rows) as three descriptor-only sections over 40 planned rows with Hermes evidence (H18), Claude review packet (C18), and CP00-563 handoff, without opening AI legal workflows, precedent, clause markup, or DD extraction runtime or any other closed runtime surface.

parsed_review.summary: Independent read-only review of CP00-562 (RP18 AI Legal Workflows, P04 workflow permission slice, descriptor-only, risk B, 40 units RP18.P04.M03.S19-RP18.P04.M05.S14) found no blocking issues. Pack binding, requirements, no-write attestation, service descriptor/case-set, validators, contract projection, tests, manifest, README, and command evidence are mutually consistent. The pack-level production_ready claim is honestly FALSE (manifest production_ready:false, runtime_ready:false, implementation_layer:descriptor); the production_ready_flag is a descriptor-verification token and the descriptor only exposes production_ready_candidate, so no production_ready gate is weakened. No-write/no-real-data boundaries are attested across all layers (writes_*/exposes_*/dispatches_*_runtime false, no_real_data true, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt false). Claude remains a read-only reviewer (Read/Grep/Glob) and is explicitly not final approver (claude_is_final_approval false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval false), with human final approval required and enterprise trust closed outside this receipt. Hermes is used only for descriptor-only evidence packet/receipt shapes, not product runtime. Review-hardening rejection list (forbidden_review_evidence) covers auth failures, zero-byte stdout, malformed JSON, fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, and missing required fields; readiness auth preflight passed with valid non-zero JSON. All 7 required public exports exist and surface via index.js export *. CP00-562 is correctly the next pack after live_state CP00-561 in the closeout-pack-plan. All implementation and plan validation gates passed (exit 0); closeout-pack:validate is appropriately deferred to post-review. The two modified progress-control-room files are correctly classified as unrelated out-of-scope dirty files.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-562 ai legal workflows core p04 workflow permission slice descriptor pack
